creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit in branch main references this bug:

URL: https://cgit.FreeBSD.org/ports/commit/?id=dc6553d233dc97aa8f39afc72e1096387ef27c12

commit dc6553d233dc97aa8f39afc72e1096387ef27c12
Author:     Oleg A. Mamontov <oleg@mamontov.net>
AuthorDate: 2023-11-13 21:16:51 +0000
Commit:     Robert Clausecker <fuz@FreeBSD.org>
CommitDate: 2023-11-18 20:20:40 +0000

    www/angie: Update to 1.3.1

     - remove @sample marker from html; these files are not supposed
       to be modified by the end user
     - obey CFLAGS/LDFLAGS and add USES=localbase.  This allows dependent
       modules to add necessary compiler/linker hints.

    Changelog: https://github.com/webserver-llc/angie/blob/master/CHANGES

    PR:             274728

 www/angie/Makefile  | 10 +++++-----
 www/angie/distinfo  |  6 +++---
 www/angie/pkg-plist |  4 ++--
 3 files changed, 10 insertions(+), 10 deletions(-)
